title: Tinnoset

infobox.value: This [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") location article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Tinnoset&action=edit).

is a village in [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The village is located at the southernmost end of the large lake [Tinnsjå](/wiki/Tinnsj%C3%A5 "Tinnsjå"), where the river [Tinnelva](/wiki/Tinnelva "Tinnelva") begins flowing south out of the lake. It is about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) south of the village of [Rudsgrendi](/wiki/Rudsgrendi "Rudsgrendi"), about 4 kilometres (2.5 mi) north of the village of [Gransherad](/wiki/Gransherad_(village) "Gransherad (village)"), and about 20 kilometres (12 mi) to the west of the village of [Bolkesjø](/wiki/Bolkesj%C3%B8 "Bolkesjø").
Sten Lundbo. ["Tinnsjå"](https://snl.no/Tinnsj%C3%A5). Store norske leksikon. Retrieved 1 December 2017.
Page may not contain recent updates.**

**Tinnoset** is a village in [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The village is located at the southernmost end of the large lake [Tinnsjå](/wiki/Tinnsj%C3%A5 "Tinnsjå"), where the river [Tinnelva](/wiki/Tinnelva "Tinnelva") begins flowing south out of the lake. It is about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) south of the village of [Rudsgrendi](/wiki/Rudsgrendi "Rudsgrendi"), about 4 kilometres (2.5 mi) north of the village of [Gransherad](/wiki/Gransherad_(village) "Gransherad (village)"), and about 20 kilometres (12 mi) to the west of the village of [Bolkesjø](/wiki/Bolkesj%C3%B8 "Bolkesjø").

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/0b/MF-Storegut_Tinnoset_2004_SRS.jpg/250px-MF-Storegut_Tinnoset_2004_SRS.jpg)](/wiki/File:MF-Storegut_Tinnoset_2004_SRS.jpg)

MF *Storegut* docked at Tinnoset

## Transportation

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tinnoset&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Transportation")]

[Tinnoset Station](/wiki/Tinnoset_Station "Tinnoset Station") is the terminus of the [Tinnoset Line](/wiki/Tinnoset_Line "Tinnoset Line"), a 30 kilometres (19 mi) long railway line that went from Tinnoset to the [town of Notodden](/wiki/Notodden_(town) "Notodden (town)"). Tinnoset Station was located adjacent to the docks at the south end of lake [Tinnsjå](/wiki/Tinnsj%C3%A5 "Tinnsjå"). From 1909 until 1991, these docks connected the [Tinnsjø railway ferry](/wiki/Tinnsj%C3%B8_railway_ferry "Tinnsjø railway ferry") system to the [Tinnoset Line](/wiki/Tinnoset_Line "Tinnoset Line") in the south. The [railway ferry service](/wiki/Train_ferry "Train ferry") crossed the lake and connected to the [Rjukan Line](/wiki/Rjukan_Line "Rjukan Line") and on to the town of [Rjukan](/wiki/Rjukan "Rjukan").[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)
